summary: 11 film announcements, 10 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Son of the Mob
film.announcement: YA rom-com film in development from The Kissing Booth duo for Red Sage Studios and Sun Distribution.

film.title: Lizard Music
film.talent: Dwayne Johnson, Theo Clark Leber (lead), Benny Safdie (director)
film.announcement: Benny Safdie directs this project with Dwayne Johnson and 10-year-old Theo Clark Leber landing the lead role opposite Johnson.

film.title: Positano
film.talent: Toni Collette, Karren Karagulian, Daniel Roher (director)
film.announcement: Netflix's Italian-set romantic caper adds Toni Collette and Karren Karagulian to cast from director Daniel Roher.

film.title: Ally
film.talent: Bong Joon Ho (director), Bradley Cooper, Ayo Edebiri (voice cast)
film.announcement: Bong Joon Ho's first animated feature with voice cast including Bradley Cooper and Ayo Edebiri sells globally through Pathé.

film.title: The Most Serious Fart
film.announcement: Utopai Studios is producing this AI-assisted animated movie written by a Not Another Teen Movie writer.

film.title: Grayson 'The Professor' Boucher Biopic
film.announcement: Deon Taylor to direct biopic on streetball star Grayson 'The Professor' Boucher for Hidden Empire Sports.

film.title: The Two Week Wait
film.talent: Daniel Ings, Jessica Brown Findlay, Olivia Grant (director)
film.announcement: Daniel Ings and Jessica Brown Findlay star in Olivia Grant's directorial debut short film.

film.title: Onwards and Sideways
film.talent: Laura Linney, Rhys Ifans, John Madden (director)
film.announcement: John Madden directs this film with Laura Linney and Rhys Ifans as people being diagnosed with Parkinson's, headed to Toronto Film Festival.

film.title: Bad Karaoke
film.announcement: Horror-comedy film debuts trailer ahead of Tubi FrightFest premiere.

film.title: Misty Green
film.announcement: Chris Rock film set for world premiere at TIFF 2026.

film.title: A Talent for Murder
film.announcement: Anton Corbijn film set for world premiere at TIFF 2026.

tv.title: Myron Bolitar
tv.talent: Chloe Fineman, Jabari Banks, Jamie McShane, Ben McKenzie
tv.announcement: Netflix series adds Chloe Fineman to cast alongside Jabari Banks, Jamie McShane, and Ben McKenzie.

tv.title: Afterlife With Archie
tv.announcement: Series based on comic greenlit by Disney+ with Halloween 2027 premiere date, reuniting Riverdale team.

tv.title: Guilty Creatures
tv.talent: Julia Garner, Lewis Pullman, Tomorrow Studios
tv.announcement: Apple TV+ thriller series adds Lewis Pullman to cast alongside Julia Garner from Tomorrow Studios.

tv.title: The Portrait of a Lady
tv.talent: Nell Tiger Free, Gemma Arterton, Bill Nighy, Jim Sturgess, Miranda Richardson
tv.announcement: PBS Masterpiece and BBC adaptation of Henry James novel with ensemble cast featuring Nell Tiger Free, Gemma Arterton, Bill Nighy, Jim Sturgess, and Miranda Richardson.

tv.title: The Earliest Show
tv.talent: Kevin Carroll, Henry Winkler, Ryan Gaul, Brandon Scott Jones
tv.announcement: Revival greenlit at Amplify Pictures with Kevin Carroll, Henry Winkler, Ryan Gaul, and Brandon Scott Jones joining cast.

tv.title: A Different World
tv.announcement: Netflix revival of A Different World with Dwayne Wayne returning without the flip-up shades, first look revealed.

tv.title: John Carter of Mars
tv.announcement: Oscar winner Mark Andrews boards animated series adaptation.

tv.title: The Dressing Room
tv.announcement: Eric McCormack to guest star in Season 2 of OUTtv's The Dressing Room.

tv.title: Roku Holiday Rom-Coms
tv.talent: Ayesha Curry, Matthew Daddario, Joey Graziadei, Jamie Chung
tv.announcement: Roku greenlights holiday romantic comedies starring Ayesha Curry, Matthew Daddario, Joey Graziadei, and Jamie Chung.

tv.title: Happy Hour
tv.announcement: Kelsey Cook sets Netflix stand-up special titled Happy Hour.
